query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "claw-swe-bench: a benchmark for evaluating openclaw-style agent harnes" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides the canonical, up-to-date empirical baseline and evaluation framework for the specific domain of LLM agents solving software engineering tasks (SWE-bench), which is the exact mechanism and population the user's "Claw-SWE-Bench" follow-up research aims to extend and evaluate.
